buggy_code_comment:
/** * Returns the percentage of values that are equal to v * (as a proportion between 0 and 1). *

* Returns Double.NaN if no values have been added.

* * @param v the value to lookup * @return the proportion of values equal to v * @deprecated replaced by {@link #getPct(Comparable)} as of 2.0 */
